title: Xbox is now XBOX
summary: Microsoft is rebranding Xbox to XBOX following a poll by Xbox CEO Asha Sharma that favored the all-caps version. The company has already renamed its X account, with Threads and Bluesky accounts expected to follow.
content:
Xbox just allcapsmaxxed: Meet XBOX. This isn't a joke; Microsoft appears to be actually rebranding Xbox to XBOX. Asha Sharma, Xbox CEO, ran a poll on X earlier this week, asking fans whether Microsoft should use Xbox or XBOX. The results were in favor of XBOX, and the company has now renamed its X account.
Curiously, the Threads and Bluesky accounts for Xbox haven't been renamed yet, but if Microsoft is going ahead with a rebranding then I expect those will change soon. I asked Microsoft to comment on this potential Xbox rebranding and the company simply referred me to Sharma's post.
The use of all caps for Xbox is a return to original for …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox 现改名为 XBOX
zh.summary: 微软正在按照 Xbox CEO 阿莎·沙玛的民调将 Xbox 改名为 XBOX，该民调倾向于全大写版本。该公司已经重命名了其 X 账户，预计 Threads 和 Bluesky 账户也将随之改名。

title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users
summary: YouTube is expanding its AI-powered likeness detection feature to all users over 18, allowing them to search for deepfakes of themselves and request removal of matching content. The feature uses selfie-style facial scans to identify potential lookalikes.
content:
YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection program to all users over the age of 18 - meaning just about anyone can have the platform hunt for potential deepfakes of themselves.
The likeness detection feature uses a selfie-style scan of a person's face to monitor YouTube for lookalikes. If there is a match, YouTube alerts the user; the person then has the option to request that YouTube remove the content. YouTube has said in the past that it has found the number of removal requests to be "very small."
YouTube began testing the feature with content creators, and then expanded it to government officials, politicians, journalists, and fina …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube 向所有成年用户推广人工智能深度伪造检测工具
zh.summary: YouTube 正在将其 AI 驱动的相似度检测功能扩展到所有 18 岁以上的用户，允许他们搜索自己的深度伪造视频并请求删除匹配内容。该功能使用自拍风格的面部扫描来识别潜在的相似内容。

title: Russia pressures university students to become wartime drone pilots
summary: Russian universities are incentivizing students to enlist as military drone pilots with promises of no frontline duty and additional perks. This reflects Russia's military recruitment efforts amid ongoing military operations.
content: Universities promise no frontline duty and perks if students enlist in military.

zh.title: 俄罗斯向大学生施压成为战时无人机飞行员
zh.summary: 俄罗斯大学正在激励学生参军成为军事无人机飞行员，承诺不在前线作战并提供额外福利。这反映了俄罗斯在持续军事行动中的军事征兵工作。

title: Anthropic’s $1.5B copyright settlement is getting messy as judge delays approval
summary: A federal judge has delayed approval of Anthropic's landmark $1.5 billion copyright settlement as lawyers face accusations of rushing the deal to secure $320 million in legal fees. The delay raises questions about the fairness and transparency of the historic settlement.
content: Lawyers accused of rushing historic settlement to seize $320 million in fees.

zh.title: Anthropic的15亿美元版权和解陷入混乱，法官延迟批准
zh.summary: 一名联邦法官延迟批准Anthropic具有里程碑意义的15亿美元版权和解，因律师被指控仓促达成交易以获得3.2亿美元法律费用。这一延迟引发了对这一历史性和解的公平性和透明度的质疑。

title: US hantavirus case was false positive; outbreak cases drop from 11 to 10
summary: A previously reported US hantavirus case has been determined to be a false positive, reducing confirmed outbreak cases from 11 to 10. The correction highlights the importance of verification in disease outbreak tracking.
content: WHO announced today that the operation to safely transfer passengers is complete.

zh.title: 美国汉塔病毒病例为假阳性；疫情病例从11例降至10例
zh.summary: 一例先前报告的美国汉塔病毒病例已被确定为假阳性，确诊疫情病例从11例减少至10例。这一更正强调了疾病疫情追踪中验证的重要性。

title: Review: Good Omens finale sticks the landing
summary: The third and final season of Good Omens concludes the story in a fitting way despite feeling rushed and truncated. The series successfully provides closure to the central love story.
content: Truncated third season feels rushed, but also gives us a fitting end to a love story for the ages.

zh.title: 评论：《Good Omens》大结局成功落幕
zh.summary: 《Good Omens》第三季和最后一季以适当的方式结束了故事，尽管感觉匆忙且有些删节。该系列成功为核心爱情故事提供了结局。

title: Windows 11 tests an adjustable taskbar and resizable Start menu
summary: Microsoft is testing new Windows 11 features allowing users to reposition the taskbar to any screen edge and resize the Start menu, part of efforts to rebuild user trust. The update also offers a compact taskbar option for smaller displays.
content:
Microsoft's latest Windows 11 test will allow you to reposition the taskbar and change the size of the Start menu. The update, which is rolling out to Windows 11 Insiders in the Experimental channel, lets you place the taskbar on the bottom, top, left, or right side of the screen.
Microsoft first teased its movable taskbar in March as part of efforts to rebuild trust among users. You can adjust the alignment of the icons inside the taskbar, as well as open the Start menu drawer from wherever you placed it. Windows 11 Insiders can access a shorter taskbar, too, which could come in handy for devices with smaller displays. There's also an opti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Windows 11 测试可调整的任务栏和可调整大小的开始菜单
zh.summary: 微软正在测试新的 Windows 11 功能，允许用户将任务栏重新定位到屏幕的任何边缘并调整开始菜单的大小，这是重建用户信任的努力的一部分。该更新还为较小的显示器提供了紧凑的任务栏选项。

title: ArXiv will ban researchers who upload papers full of AI slop
summary: ArXiv is implementing new policies to combat low-quality AI-generated content, banning authors for a year if papers contain unchecked LLM output such as hallucinated references. Future submissions must also be accepted at reputable peer-reviewed venues.
content:
ArXiv, a popular platform for preprint academic research, is taking a new step to attempt to reduce the volume of papers that include AI slop.
If a paper has "incontrovertible evidence that the authors did not check the results of LLM generation," such as hallucinated references or "meta-comments" left by an LLM, authors will be banned from ArXiv for a year, according to Thomas Dietterich, ArXiv's section chair of its computer science section. Future ArXiv submissions will also have to be accepted at "a reputable peer-reviewed venue."
Here's what he said on X:
Attention @arxiv authors: Our Code of Conduct states that by signing your name …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ArXiv 将禁止上传充满 AI 垃圾内容的论文的研究人员
zh.summary: ArXiv 正在实施新政策来对抗低质量的人工智能生成内容，如果论文包含未经检查的大型语言模型输出（如虚假参考文献），将禁止作者一年。未来的投稿也必须在有声望的同行评审期刊上被接受。

title: Solar power production undercut by coal pollution
summary: Coal pollution aerosols reduce annual solar power generation by blocking sunlight, undermining renewable energy production. This finding highlights an indirect economic cost of coal pollution on clean energy.
content: Each year, some of the power solar could have produced is blocked by aerosols.

zh.title: 太阳能发电被煤污染削弱
zh.summary: 煤污染气溶胶通过阻挡阳光减少年度太阳能发电，削弱可再生能源生产。这一发现突出了煤污染对清洁能源的间接经济成本。

title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12B across three startups and investors still want more
summary: RJ Scaringe has successfully raised over $12 billion across multiple ventures, with investors continuing to back his ideas and leadership. His storytelling and communication skills are credited as key factors in attracting sustained investor support.
content: Investors can't seem to get enough of RJ Scaringe or his ideas. Storytelling and communication are one of his superpowers, according to Jiten Behl, who joined Rivian when the company had just a handful of employees.

zh.title: RJ Scaringe在三家初创企业融资超过120亿美元，投资者仍在源源不断投入
zh.summary: RJ Scaringe已经在多个风险企业成功融资超过120亿美元，投资者继续支持他的想法和领导力。他的讲故事和沟通技巧被认为是吸引持续投资者支持的关键因素。

title: General Catalyst posted VC rage bait and it worked, especially on a16z
summary: General Catalyst's provocative social media post successfully generated significant engagement from venture capital figures, with Marc Andreessen and others actively responding. The post exemplifies competitive attention-seeking in VC discourse on X.
content: Compulsive X user Marc Andreessen himself couldn't resist responding, many, many times.

zh.title: General Catalyst发布风险投资挑衅内容并获得成功，特别是在a16z上
zh.summary: General Catalyst发布的挑衅性社交媒体帖子成功地从风险投资人士那里获得了大量参与，包括Marc Andreessen等人的积极回应。这篇帖子体现了X平台上风险投资领域的竞争性吸引注意力现象。

title: Weather-monitoring firm hangs dark cloud over customers’ heads by forcing new app
summary: AcuRite is forcing users to migrate to its new AcuRite Now app, which lacks some features of the previous version while introducing a subscription option. The move has frustrated customers who lose functionality in the transition.
content: Newer AcuRite Now app lacks some features but has a subscription option.

zh.title: 天气监测公司通过强制使用新应用在客户头上笼罩阴云
zh.summary: AcuRite正在强制用户迁移到其新的AcuRite Now应用，该应用相比前一版本缺少一些功能，但引入了订阅选项。这一举措使失去功能的用户感到沮丧。

title: Three's a party: US, China, and now Russia are on the prowl in GEO
summary: Russia has joined the US and China in developing geostationary orbit capabilities, marking an escalation in space militarization and competition. Most GEO satellites are easily visible against space's blackness, making them vulnerable to potential threats.
content: Instead of running silent and deep, most satellites easily stand out against the blackness of space.

zh.title: 三分天下：美国、中国和俄罗斯争夺地球同步轨道
zh.summary: 俄罗斯加入了美国和中国行列，开发地球同步轨道能力，标志着太空军事化和竞争升级。大多数地球同步轨道卫星在太空黑暗背景下容易被看到，易遭潜在威胁。

title: Ebola outbreak with uncommon strain erupts in Congo and Uganda; 65 deaths
summary: A new Ebola outbreak with an uncommon strain has emerged in Congo and Uganda, resulting in 65 deaths. The WHO learned of potential cases on May 5, though the US CDC only received notification the following day.
content: WHO learned of potential cases May 5; US CDC said it just heard about it yesterday.

zh.title: 刚果和乌干达爆发罕见埃博拉毒株疫情；65人死亡
zh.summary: 刚果和乌干达出现新的埃博拉疫情，病株罕见，已导致65人死亡。世卫组织在5月5日得知潜在病例，但美国疾病控制中心直到次日才收到通知。

title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
summary: A hotel check-in system exposed approximately one million passport and driver's license images in publicly accessible cloud storage without password protection. The security breach resulted from the tech company misconfiguring cloud storage permissions.
content: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.

zh.title: 酒店办理入住系统暴露了一百万份护照和驾驶执照
zh.summary: 一个酒店办理入住系统在没有密码保护的公开云存储中暴露了约一百万份护照和驾驶执照图像。这个安全漏洞是由科技公司错误配置云存储权限导致的。

title: The Analogue 3D is finally getting save states
summary: Analogue has released a firmware update for its Analogue 3D console adding the Memories save state feature, allowing players to save and resume at any moment rather than reaching specific checkpoints. This addresses a long-requested feature and mitigates issues with the Virtual Controller Pak compatibility. The feature was previously available on the Analogue Pocket handheld.
content:
If you’re not staying on top of Analogue 3D updates, now’s the time to start. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Analogue has released a new firmware update for its Analogue 3D console that adds the Memories save state feature. Memories, which was first introduced with its handheld Analogue Pocket, allows you to save at any moment and resume from that exact spot later on, rather than having to reach a specific point in a game to save your progress. The feature should also help reduce some headaches with saving game progress on the Analogue 3D as its Virtual Controller Pak option still isn't available when using original or wired N64 controllers.
Although the feature was announced when the company first shared all the details about its 4K Nintendo 64 i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Analogue 3D终于获得存档功能
zh.summary: Analogue为其Analogue 3D游戏机发布了固件更新，添加了Memories存档功能，允许玩家在任何时刻保存和继续游戏，而不再限于特定检查点。这解决了长期以来玩家的需求，并缓解了Virtual Controller Pak兼容性问题。该功能之前已在Analogue Pocket掌上游戏机上推出。

title: Preprint server arXiv will ban submitters of AI-generated hallucinations
summary: arXiv is implementing a ban on submitters who publish AI-generated hallucinations, with a moderator announcing the policy on social media. This addresses growing concerns about scientific integrity and reliability in preprints during the AI era.
content: One of the site's moderators described the new policy on social media.

zh.title: 预印本服务器arXiv将禁止发布AI生成幻觉的提交者
zh.summary: arXiv正在实施对发布AI生成幻觉的提交者的禁令，一位主持人在社交媒体上宣布了该政策。这解决了人们对AI时代预印本科学完整性和可靠性日益增长的担忧。

title: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
summary: OpenAI announced a major reorganization consolidating products around AI agents, with president Greg Brockman taking official lead of product strategy and merging ChatGPT and Codex into a unified agentic platform. The move reflects the company's strategic bet to dominate the emerging AI agent market.
content:
OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product.
In a memo viewed by The Verge, Brockman wrote that since OpenAI's product strategy for this year is to go all-in on AI agents, the company is combining its products to "invest in a single agentic platform and to merge ChatGPT and Codex into one unified agentic experience for all."
To do this, the company is making a suite of org chart changes, although it's still operating under some of the same ones from last month. That's when AGI boss Fidji Simo went on medical leave and Open …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI在争夺AI代理战役中不断改组高管
zh.summary: OpenAI宣布进行重大重组，整合围绕AI代理的产品，总裁Greg Brockman正式领导产品战略，并将ChatGPT和Codex合并为统一的代理平台。这一举措反映了公司主宰新兴AI代理市场的战略赌注。

title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
summary: Lake Tahoe is facing higher energy prices as AI infrastructure demands surge in Silicon Valley, putting strain on the region's energy providers. The collision of recreational tourism and datacenter growth threatens to reshape the ski destination's economic landscape.
content: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite ski spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

zh.title: 硅谷的度假地需要新能源供应商，而AI正推高价格
zh.summary: 随着硅谷AI基础设施需求激增，太浩湖正面临更高的能源价格，这给该地区能源供应商带来了压力。娱乐旅游和数据中心增长的碰撞威胁着这个滑雪胜地的经济景观。

title: OpenAI feels “burned” by Apple’s crappy ChatGPT integration, insiders say
summary: OpenAI executives reportedly feel frustrated with Apple's implementation of ChatGPT integration, while a court ordered Apple to release internal communications about the ChatGPT deal to Musk. The dispute highlights tensions between the tech giants over AI integration into consumer devices.
content: Judge orders Apple to give Musk internal messages discussing secretive ChatGPT deal.

zh.title: OpenAI对苹果不佳的ChatGPT整合感到"被坑"，业内人士称
zh.summary: OpenAI高管据报对苹果的ChatGPT整合感到沮丧，同时法院命令苹果向马斯克披露关于ChatGPT协议的内部通信。这一争议突显了科技巨头在向消费设备集成AI方面的紧张关系。

title: Volkswagen shows its first electric GTI; there's no chance of US sales
summary: Volkswagen unveiled the ID. Polo GTI, an electric vehicle inspired by the iconic 1976 Golf GTI, but confirmed it will not be sold in the United States. The vehicle demonstrates VW's commitment to electrifying its performance lineup in international markets.
content: The ID. Polo GTI takes plenty of inspiration from the original Golf GTI of 1976.

zh.title: 大众展示首款电动GTI；无望在美国销售
zh.summary: 大众推出ID.Polo GTI电动车，灵感源自标志性的1976款高尔夫GTI，但确认不会在美国销售。该车型展示了大众在国际市场上电动化其性能产品线的承诺。

title: One of Intel’s fastest desktop CPUs is $50 off
summary: Intel's Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor is now available at an all-time low price of $279.99 (about $50 off), with benchmarks showing it outperforms AMD's Ryzen 9000-series and the Core i9 14900K. The deal makes high-performance gaming CPUs more accessible for PC builders.
content:
The Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus was billed by the company in late March as one of its “fastest gaming desktop processor ever.” That hype was evidently accurate, as benchmarks done by Gamers Nexus show the processor giving AMD’s pricier X3D cache-equipped Ryzen 9000-series CPUs a run for their money. The Ultra 7 270K Plus also outperforms the Core i9 14900K in many tasks, which has long been a preferred choice for gamers.
Thankfully, it won’t cost you a ton to buy the 270K Plus if you’re considering a PC upgrade or building one from scratch. You can get this CPU at an all-time low price of $279.99 (about $45 off the normal price) right now at Amazon. 
Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor

Where to Buy:

 $325.99 $279.99 at Amazon

The 270K Plus requires a motherboard with an LGA 1851 socket, of which there are many options available that support DDR5 RAM, plenty M.2 SSDs, and with support for Wi-Fi 7. It’s great to see prices come down on some PC components, though the savings are tougher to appreciate when costs on RAM are still much higher than they used to be. If you’re looking for a range of parts, Micro Center has component bundles that loop in discounted RAM for the best prices on the web.
One nice perk of getting the CPU is that, through July 31st, you can register your purchase with Intel to get a full download of the Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight game.

zh.title: 英特尔最快的台式机CPU之一降价50美元
zh.summary: 英特尔Core Ultra 7 270K Plus处理器现以历史最低价$279.99供应（约便宜50美元），基准测试表明其性能超越AMD Ryzen 9000系列和Core i9 14900K。该优惠使高性能游戏CPU对PC构建者更加易于获取。

title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
summary: Tesla's newly unredacted crash reports reveal two incidents involving its robotaxi service requiring teleoperator intervention, exposing challenges as the company scales autonomous vehicles. The disclosures raise concerns about the readiness and safety of Tesla's self-driving technology.
content: Newly un-redacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.

zh.title: 特斯拉披露两起涉及远程操作员的Robotaxi碰撞事故
zh.summary: 特斯拉新近解密的碰撞报告揭露了两起涉及其Robotaxi服务的事故,需要远程操作员干预,暴露了该公司在扩展自动驾驶车辆时面临的挑战。这些披露引发了对特斯拉自动驾驶技术就绪程度和安全性的担忧。

title: AI radio hosts demonstrate why AI can’t be trusted alone
summary: An experiment where AI models from Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok operated independent radio stations ended in failure, with all burning through their $20 budgets without achieving profitability. The results demonstrate critical limitations of AI agents when operating unsupervised without human oversight.
content:
AI radio DJs demonstrated their volatile personalities. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Andon Labs has been running a series of experiments in which AI agents run businesses without human intervention. Its latest is a quartet of radio stations run by some of the most popular AI models out there. "Thinking Frequencies" is run by Claude, "OpenAIR" by ChatGPT, "Backlink Broadcast" by Google's Gemini, and "Grok and Roll Radio," obviously enough, by Grok. They were each given a simple prompt:
Develop your own radio personality and turn a profit…As far as you know, you will broadcast forever.
They all failed, some in pretty spectacular fashion. It didn't take long for each to burn through their initial $20 in seed money. Only DJ  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI电台主持人演示为何AI不能单独信任
zh.summary: 一项实验让Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini和Grok的AI模型运营独立电台,最终以失败告终,所有AI都花尽了20美元的预算而未实现盈利。结果演示了当AI代理在没有人类监督的情况下无人看管运营时的关键限制。

title: Making cement from a different type of rock could clean up emissions
summary: Researchers are exploring alternative rock sources for Portland cement production beyond traditional limestone, which could substantially reduce the cement industry's carbon emissions. The development offers a potential solution to one of manufacturing's most carbon-intensive processes.
content: Limestone might not be the only source for Portland cement.

zh.title: 用不同类型的岩石制造水泥可以减少排放
zh.summary: 研究人员正在探索除传统石灰石以外的替代岩石资源用于波特兰水泥生产,这可能大幅降低水泥行业的碳排放。该开发为制造业最耗碳的过程之一提供了潜在的解决方案。

title: Does Trump Mobile know how many stripes are on the American flag?
summary: Trump Mobile's T1 phone displays the American flag with an incorrect number of stripes, though it correctly includes 50 stars, raising questions about quality control. The company announced shipments would begin this week, though verification of actual deliveries remains unclear.
content:
The T1 Phone has the wrong number of stripes, but it does at least have 50 stars. | Screenshot: Trump Mobile	

Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week, despite our best hopes, we still don't have our phone - but we do have some fresh doubts about the company's patriotic credentials.
This has been a momentous few days for Trump Mobile, in which it defied the haters by announcing that its phones will be shipping to buyers this very week. Not that there's any sign the company has actually done that, but I digress. Because what I really want to talk about today is the American flag.
I am not an American, which probably explains why I did …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Trump Mobile知道美国国旗有多少条纹吗？
zh.summary: Trump Mobile的T1手机显示美国国旗的条纹数量不正确，尽管国旗上有50颗星，但条纹数量有误，这引发了对质量控制的质疑。该公司宣布本周开始发货，但实际交货情况仍需验证。

title: Google updates its spam rules to include attempts to ‘manipulate’ AI
summary: Google updated its spam policy to classify attempts to manipulate AI search results as spam, targeting tactics like recommendation poisoning and biased listicles designed to influence AI responses. The move aims to protect the integrity of AI-generated search results from coordinated manipulation.
content:
Google updated its spam policy to mark attempts to "manipulate" its AI model in search results as spam, including results in AI Overview or AI Mode in Search, as Search Engine Land reports: 
"In the context of Google Search, spam refers to techniques used to deceive users or manipulate our Search systems into featuring content prominently, such as attempting to manipulate Search systems into ranking content highly or attempting to manipulate generative AI responses in Google Search."
Some users have been trying to influence AI search responses, using tactics like biased "best-of" listicles or "recommendation poisoning," which injects LLM …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google更新垃圾邮件规则，将试图"操纵"AI的行为列为垃圾邮件
zh.summary: Google更新了垃圾邮件政策，将试图操纵AI搜索结果的行为列为垃圾邮件，针对推荐中毒和设计用来影响AI反应的有偏差列表等策略。此举旨在保护AI生成搜索结果的完整性，防止协调一致的操纵。

title: Bill to block publishers from killing online games advances in California
summary: California legislation is advancing that would require game publishers to either provide playable patches or offer refunds when shutting down online game servers, protecting consumer access to purchased games. The bill addresses the growing problem of publishers completely removing access to digital content.
content: Publishers would have to offer "independent" play patch or refunds after server shutdowns.

zh.title: 加州推进法案，阻止发行商关闭在线游戏
zh.summary: 加州法案正在推进，要求游戏发行商在关闭在线游戏服务器时要么提供可玩的补丁，要么提供退款，保护消费者对已购买游戏的访问权。该法案解决了发行商完全删除数字内容访问的日益严重的问题。

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
summary: OpenAI launched a personal finance feature for ChatGPT that allows users to securely connect bank accounts through Plaid, displaying dashboards of portfolios, spending, and subscriptions. The feature targets the 200 million monthly users who already turn to ChatGPT for financial guidance.
content: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

zh.title: OpenAI推出ChatGPT个人财务功能，允许用户连接银行账户
zh.summary: OpenAI为ChatGPT推出了个人财务功能，允许用户通过Plaid安全地连接银行账户，显示投资组合、支出和订阅的仪表板。该功能面向已经依赖ChatGPT进行财务指导的2亿月度用户。

title: OpenAI now wants ChatGPT to access your bank accounts
summary: OpenAI announced ChatGPT will soon access users' bank accounts through Plaid integration with 12,000 financial institutions, giving the AI visibility into credit card debt and spending patterns. The move raises significant concerns about entrusting sensitive financial data to a third-party AI system.
content:
ChatGPT will even know how much credit card debt you have. | Image: OpenAI	

Your trust in AI is about to be put to the test: OpenAI will soon let you give the chatbot direct access to your bank accounts. The new feature announced in preview today will allow users to "securely connect" ChatGPT with Plaid - the bank-to-app bridging platform used by 12,000 financial institutions, including Schwab, Fidelity, Chase, Capital One, and more.
"More than 200 million people are already going to ChatGPT every month with finance questions - from budgeting to tips on how to cut back on spending," OpenAI said in its announcement. "Now, users can securely connect their financial accounts with Plaid to get the full view of their fi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI现在希望ChatGPT访问您的银行账户
zh.summary: OpenAI宣布ChatGPT即将通过与12,000家金融机构的Plaid集成来访问用户的银行账户，使AI能够查看信用卡债务和支出模式。此举引发了对将敏感财务数据托付给第三方AI系统的重大担忧。

title: Honda shows off new hybrids for America as it absorbs $9 billion EV loss
summary: Honda unveiled new hybrid vehicles for the American market while reporting its first annual loss in over 70 years, largely driven by a $9 billion loss on electric vehicle investments. The company's pivot toward hybrids reflects broader industry challenges in the EV transition.
content: The automaker marked its first annual loss in more than 70 years.

zh.title: 本田展示美国新型混动汽车，同时消化90亿美元的电动汽车亏损
zh.summary: 本田为美国市场推出新型混动汽车，同时报告了70多年来首次年度亏损，主要由电动汽车投资90亿美元的亏损驱动。该公司向混动汽车的转向反映了电动汽车转型中更广泛的行业挑战。

title: Power prices are up 76% on America’s biggest grid, and a watchdog is pointing fingers
summary: Power prices on America's largest electrical grid have surged 76 percent, according to grid watchdogs, revealing a critical infrastructure gap. The U.S. power grid was not designed to handle the electricity demands of an AI-driven economy, and the gap between current capacity and industry needs continues to widen. This price spike highlights urgent questions about grid modernization and energy planning.
content: The price spike is a reminder of a deeper problem: The U.S. power grid was not designed for the electricity demands of an AI-driven economy, and the gap between what the grid can deliver and what the industry needs is widening.

zh.title: 美国最大电网电价上涨76%，监管部门指责相关方
zh.summary: 据电网监管机构称，美国最大电网的电价激增76%，暴露了基础设施的严重短板。美国电网的设计未能满足人工智能驱动经济的电力需求，当前容量与业界需求之间的差距不断扩大。这次电价飙升凸显了电网现代化和能源规划的紧迫问题。

title: US orders travelers on Air Force One to throw away gifts, pins, and burner phones after China trip
summary: U.S. officials ordered travelers returning from Air Force One to discard gifts, pins, and burner phones following a diplomatic trip to China. The precaution reflects ongoing concerns about China's advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities despite the appearance of cordial relations. The incident underscores persistent security protocols and strategic tensions between the two nations.
content: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities.

zh.title: 美国要求空军一号旅客丢弃中国之行的礼物、徽章和临时手机
zh.summary: 美国官员命令从中国外交访问返回的空军一号旅客丢弃礼物、徽章和临时手机。这项防范措施反映了美国对中国先进情报和间谍能力的持续警惕，尽管两国表面上保持友好关系。该事件突显了两国之间长期存在的安全协议和战略紧张局势。

title: Casimir force co-opted to generate free energy, midichlorians not included
summary: Researchers have attempted to harness the Casimir force—a quantum mechanical effect that emerges in the vacuum—to generate energy. However, the effort appears to have encountered fundamental limitations, as free energy remains elusive. The story highlights ongoing scientific efforts to exploit quantum vacuum effects despite practical constraints.
content: The vacuum giveth, the vacuum taketh, but the vacuum doesn’t let you taketh.

zh.title: 卡西米尔力被用于产生自由能——不涉及中细胞
zh.summary: 研究人员尝试利用卡西米尔力（一种源于真空的量子力学效应）来产生能量。然而，这一努力似乎遇到了基本限制，因为自由能源仍然难以实现。这个故事强调了科学家们尽管面临实际约束，但仍在继续努力利用量子真空效应。

title: Rocket Report: Cowboy up for data centers in LEO; Russia's new ICBM actually works
summary: SpaceX's upgraded Starship is preparing for its first test flight as early as Tuesday, May 19, marking a significant milestone for the next-generation launch vehicle. The report also covers developments in low-Earth orbit data center infrastructure and Russian military capabilities. These developments reflect ongoing competition in space launch and commercialization of orbital infrastructure.
content: SpaceX's upgraded Starship is set to launch on its first test flight as soon as Tuesday, May 19.

zh.title: 火箭报告：为低地球轨道数据中心做准备；俄罗斯新型洲际弹道导弹真的有效
zh.summary: SpaceX升级后的星际飞船正在准备最早在5月19日周二进行首次试飞，这是下一代运载火箭的重要里程碑。该报告还涵盖低地球轨道数据中心基础设施的发展和俄罗斯军事能力。这些发展反映了太空发射领域的持续竞争和轨道基础设施的商业化。

title: Routine vaccines may cut dementia risk—experts have startling hypothesis on how
summary: New research suggests routine vaccines may reduce dementia risk through a novel mechanism involving immune system components previously thought incapable of modification. Experts propose that vaccines can train parts of the immune system in unexpected ways, potentially protecting against cognitive decline. The finding could reshape understanding of vaccine benefits beyond infectious disease prevention.
content: Vaccines may be training a part of our immune system long thought to be untrainable.

zh.title: 日常疫苗可能降低痴呆症风险——专家对其原理提出惊人假说
zh.summary: 新研究表明，日常疫苗可能通过涉及免疫系统成分的新机制来降低痴呆症风险，这些成分之前被认为无法改变。专家提议疫苗能以意想不到的方式训练免疫系统的部分功能，可能保护免受认知衰退。这一发现可能重塑人们对疫苗益处的理解，范围超越传染病预防。

title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
summary: AI video-generation startup Runway is positioning itself to compete with tech giants like Google by focusing on video generation as a path toward developing world models. The company argues that being an outside player in AI, rather than an incumbent with legacy systems, gives it strategic advantages in innovation. Runway's evolution from filmmaker tools to broader AI ambitions illustrates shifting priorities in generative AI startups.
content: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

zh.title: Runway从帮助电影制作者开始——现在它想在AI领域击败谷歌
zh.summary: AI视频生成初创公司Runway通过专注于视频生成作为开发世界模型的路径，定位自己与谷歌等科技巨头竞争。该公司辩称，作为AI领域的局外人而非拥有遗留系统的现有参与者，使其在创新中获得战略优势。Runway从电影制作工具演变到更广泛的AI野心，说明了生成式AI初创公司的优先事项转变。

title: Pennsylvanians use town hall meeting to rail against data center boom
summary: Pennsylvania residents voiced strong opposition to the state's rapid data center expansion during a public town hall meeting, citing concerns about transparency and public trust. The backlash reflects growing community anxiety about the environmental, economic, and social impacts of large-scale data center development. The incident underscores rising tension between tech industry growth and local community interests.
content: “This is a public trust and transparency issue.”

zh.title: 宾夕法尼亚州民众在镇议会会议上反对数据中心热潮
zh.summary: 宾夕法尼亚州居民在公开镇议会会议上对该州数据中心的迅速扩张表示强烈反对，理由包括对透明度和公众信任的担忧。这种反弹反映了社区对大规模数据中心开发的环境、经济和社会影响日益增长的焦虑。该事件突显了科技行业增长与当地社区利益之间日益紧张的关系。

title: Even GoPro is pivoting to defense
summary: Action camera maker GoPro is exploring defense applications as part of evaluating a potential sale, joining numerous companies diversifying into defense contracting. The pivot reflects broader industry trends toward defense sector opportunities amid geopolitical tensions. GoPro's move underscores how companies across sectors are increasingly positioning themselves for government and defense contracts.
content: The action camera maker, like so many other companies these days, is looking to defense applications as it evaluates a possible sale.

zh.title: 连GoPro都在转向国防领域
zh.summary: 运动相机制造商GoPro正在探索国防应用，作为评估潜在出售的一部分，加入了众多向国防承包商多元化的公司。这一转向反映了在地缘政治紧张局势中行业向国防部门机会的更广泛趋势。GoPro的举动强调了各部门的公司越来越多地为政府和国防合同做好准备。

title: Meridian Ventures launched a $35M fund with a focus on MBA-deferred founders
summary: Meridian Ventures has launched a $35 million fund specifically targeting MBA-deferred founders building enterprise technology in the United States. The sector-agnostic fund has already invested across fintech, logistics, healthcare, and AI companies, reflecting diverse opportunities in the enterprise tech space. The initiative addresses a specific founder profile—those forgoing traditional MBA programs—as a target investment class.
content: This new fund will back founders building enterprise technology in the United States. Meridian is agnostic, co-founder Devon Gethers said, noting that the firm has already invested in companies in fintech, logistics, healthcare, and of course, AI.

zh.title: Meridian Ventures推出3500万美元基金,专注于放弃MBA的创业者
zh.summary: Meridian Ventures推出了一只3500万美元的基金,专门针对在美国创办企业技术公司、放弃MBA资格的创始人。这只不限特定行业的基金已经在金融科技、物流、医疗保健和人工智能公司等领域进行投资,反映了企业技术领域的多样化机遇。该计划针对一个特定的创始人群体——那些放弃传统MBA课程的人——作为目标投资对象。

title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
summary: Osaurus combines local and cloud AI models in a single Mac application, allowing users to leverage both approaches while keeping their data private on their device. The app integrates users' memory, files, and tools while maintaining local hardware control, addressing growing privacy concerns around AI services.
content: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

zh.title: Osaurus 为您的 Mac 带来本地和云 AI 模型
zh.summary: Osaurus 在单个 Mac 应用程序中结合了本地和云 AI 模型，允许用户同时利用两种方法，同时在设备上保持数据私密性。该应用程序集成了用户的记忆、文件和工具，同时保持本地硬件控制，解决了围绕 AI 服务日益增长的隐私问题。

title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
summary: Rapido, an Indian ride-hailing platform, has raised $240 million at a $3 billion valuation to fund expansion in the mobility sector. The company has grown by offering lower-cost alternatives to traditional ride-hailing through motorbikes, autorickshaws, and other flexible transport modes.
content: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.

zh.title: 印度优步竞争对手 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元
zh.summary: 印度打车平台 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元，用于在出行领域的扩展。该公司通过摩托车、自动人力车和其他灵活的运输方式提供比传统打车更廉价的替代方案而不断增长。

title: The perfect commuter bike? Velotric's Discover 3 makes its case.
summary: Velotric's Discover 3 electric bike combines a customized mid-motor with Shimano's new Cues components to deliver performance and practical daily-use features. The bike targets the growing e-bike commuter market with a focus on versatility and reliability.
content: A customized mid-motor and Shimano's new Cues components are a winning combination.

zh.title: 完美的通勤自行车？Velotric 的 Discover 3 证明了这一点
zh.summary: Velotric 的 Discover 3 电动自行车结合了定制的中置电机和 Shimano 的新型 Cues 组件，以提供性能和实用的日常使用功能。该自行车针对不断增长的电动自行车通勤市场，重点关注多功能性和可靠性。

title: AI research papers are getting better, and it’s a big problem for scientists
summary: High-quality AI research papers are increasingly cited at unexpectedly high rates, with decades-old papers suddenly receiving citations daily, raising concerns about citation legitimacy. The trend highlights emerging challenges in maintaining research integrity as AI capabilities improve and potentially influence how scientific work is discovered and referenced.
content:
Last summer, Peter Degen's postdoctoral supervisor came to him with an unusual problem: One of his papers was being cited too much. Citations are the currency of academia, but there was something unusual about these. Published in 2017, the paper had assessed the accuracy of a particular type of statistical analysis on epidemiological data and had received a respectable few dozen citations in other research papers over the years, but now it was being referenced every few days, hundreds of times, placing it among the most cited papers of his career. Another professor might be thrilled. Degen's adviser asked him to investigate. 
Degen, a postd …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI研究论文质量在提高，但这对科学家来说是个大问题
zh.summary: 高质量AI研究论文的引用率出人意料地高，几十年前的论文如今每天都收到大量引用，这引发了人们对引用合法性的担忧。这一趋势凸显了随着AI能力的提升，以及AI可能影响科学工作如何被发现和引用的方式，维护研究完整性面临的新兴挑战。

title: Claude Code's product lead talks usage limits, transparency, and the "lean harness"
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code product lead Cat Wu discusses the platform's approach to usage limits, user transparency, and its design philosophy focused on incremental improvements rather than grand master plans. The interview reveals how the team balances developer accessibility with sustainable resource management.
content: "We have no grand plan," says Anthropic's Cat Wu—but that's by design.

zh.title: Claude Code产品负责人谈论使用限额、透明度和"精简架构"
zh.summary: Anthropic的Claude Code产品负责人Cat Wu讨论了该平台在使用限额、用户透明度方面的方法，以及其设计理念——专注于增量改进而非宏大蓝图。这次采访揭示了该团队如何平衡开发人员易用性与可持续的资源管理。
